title: Destroying Sessions
description: End sessions, unset variables, and log users out.

slides.title: Ending a Session
Simple Logout Example
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
session_start();
unset($_SESSION['username']);
$_SESSION = [];
session_destroy();
header('Location: login.php');
exit;
?>

quizData.question: Which function destroys the session data on the server?
quizData.explanation: session_destroy() destroys all data associated with the current session.
